metadata.prompt: A wide, high-angle shot of a stark, glass-walled corporate boardroom at dawn. The room is bathed in pale, golden sunlight filtering through floor-to-ceiling windows. A long, sleek table dominates the foreground, flanked by glowing monitors displaying data. The contrast between the bright light and deep shadows is heightened, emphasizing the sterile, oppressive atmosphere.

Medium shot from the side of DR. ELENA MARIS (40s, weary but resolute) standing at the head of the table, her hand gripping a USB drive tightly. MR. GRAYSON (50s, coldly polished) sits at the table, fingers steepled, his face half-lit by the sun. The lighting is soft but harsh, casting sharp shadows across their faces to underscore tension.

Close-up low-angle shot of the USB drive being inserted into a monitor. The drive’s metallic surface reflects faint light as it connects. The monitor screen flickers, revealing a live feed of the reef’s collapsing ecosystem in the background. The composition focuses on the drive and monitor, with cold, clinical lighting.

Dramatic high-angle shot looking down on the table. The monitors now display the reef’s destruction in vivid, distressing detail. Elena’s silhouette is seen standing rigidly, her figure dwarfed by the overwhelming visual of the collapsing ecosystem. The lighting shifts to a cold, blue hue, casting long shadows across the room.

A wide shot of a stark, modern corporate boardroom at dawn. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls reflect the pale golden light of a rising sun. A long, sleek table dominates the frame, flanked by glowing monitors displaying data. The room is minimalist, with harsh shadows cast by the early light, evoking tension and isolation.

Medium shot of DR. ELENA MARIS (40s, weary but resolute) standing at the head of the table, clutching a USB drive. MR. GRAYSON (50s, coldly polished) sits at the opposite end, fingers steepled, leaning back in his chair. Their expressions are starkly contrasting: Elena’s determined, Grayson’s calculating. Soft light from the windows highlights their faces, casting sharp shadows across their features.

Close-up of Elena’s hand inserting the USB drive into a monitor. The screen flickers, revealing a live feed of a collapsing coral reef. The monitor’s glow reflects in her eyes, which are intense and resolute. The background is blurred, focusing on the urgency of the action and the stark contrast between the digital data and the natural disaster it represents.

Low-angle wide shot of the boardroom, capturing the entire table and monitors now displaying the reef’s collapse. The rising sun’s light streams through the glass walls, casting dramatic chiaroscuro across the room. Elena stands at the center, backlit, as Grayson’s shadow looms over her. The scene is tense, with the digital and natural worlds colliding in a visually striking climax.

metadata.rejection_note_used: US-V02: slightly longer hold on frame 2.
US-V02 A-01: increase contrast and wider establishing shots.
